properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is an influence upon me that I know is real A connection from a realm somewhere in the unseen, It’s an influence that’s heavenly it comes from above, It’s Jesus, the great fountain of agape love.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The sweet influence of Jesus Christ, Sweet influences of the Seven Stars, Held firmly by Orion’s bands, secured in his love, Sweet influences flows from above.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It gives me real conviction when I tend to stray It keeps me walking in the straight and narrow way, When friends around me try to shake me from my stand, I’m influenced by Jesus and held firm in His hand.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I see a world of people all going downstream, It’s evident their influence comes from beneath, But something keeps me going upstream against that flow, It’s the influence of Jesus that’s upon me I know.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: A great cloud of witnesses stands in glory today, They overcame by the word, God opened up in their day, I’m identified with these who took that great stand, All influenced by Pleiades the stars in His right hand.
